overview.short: Padayanivettom Devi temple is a Hindu temple in Kerala.
overview.description: Padayanivettom Devi temple is a Hindu temple in Kerala. The temple is located at Vallikunnam in Mavelikkara taluk of Alappuzha district in the south Indian state of Kerala. The temple is situated about 10 km south of Mavelikkara, 9 km east of Ochira on NH 47.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kattanam
topPlaces.description: Kattanam is a village located in Alappuzha district of the Indian state of Kerala. It is in the southern part of the country, 2,200 km south of the capital New Delhi.

topPlaces.name: Charummood
topPlaces.description: Charummood (also spelled Charummoodu) is a town in Mavelikkara Taluk of Alappuzha district in Kerala, India. Charummood is 12 km east of the nearest town Kayamkulam, 15 km west of Adoor and 12 km south of Mavelikkara.

topPlaces.name: Chunakkara
topPlaces.description: Chunakkara is a village in Mavelikara Tahsil of Alappuzha district, in the Indian state of Kerala. It is located on the Kollam Theni Highway spanning in around 6 km (3.7 mi) in length along the highway.

topPlaces.name: Thamarakkulam
topPlaces.description: Thamarakulam is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. Located in Alappuzha District of Kerala, Thamarakulam is around 16 km south-east of Kayamkulam.

topPlaces.name: Bharanikkavu
topPlaces.description: Bharanikkavu is a Panchayat in the Kayamkulam legislative assembly in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. The village by the same name is a part of it.

topPlaces.name: Vallikunnam
topPlaces.description: Vallikunnam is a village in Mavelikara taluk of Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Vallikavu
topPlaces.description: Vallikavu is a small village in Kollam District of Kerala. Vallikavu is chiefly inhabited by farmers and fishermen.

topPlaces.name: Perungala
topPlaces.description: Perungala is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.

items.note: Kattanam is a village located in Alappuzha district of the Indian state of Kerala. It is in the southern part of the country, 2,200 km south of the capital New Delhi.

Charummood (also spelled Charummoodu) is a town in Mavelikkara Taluk of Alappuzha district in Kerala, India. Charummood is 12 km east of the nearest town Kayamkulam, 15 km west of Adoor and 12 km south of Mavelikkara.

Chunakkara is a village in Mavelikara Tahsil of Alappuzha district, in the Indian state of Kerala. It is located on the Kollam Theni Highway spanning in around 6 km (3.7 mi) in length along the highway.
Thamarakulam is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. Located in Alappuzha District of Kerala, Thamarakulam is around 16 km south-east of Kayamkulam.
Bharanikkavu is a Panchayat in the Kayamkulam legislative assembly in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. The village by the same name is a part of it.
Vallikunnam is a village in Mavelikara taluk of Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.
Vallikavu is a small village in Kollam District of Kerala. Vallikavu is chiefly inhabited by farmers and fishermen.
Perungala is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Padayanivettom?
faq.a: The best time to visit Padayanivettom is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (83 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (84 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Padayanivettom?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Padayanivettom at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Padayanivettom?
faq.a: Stays in Padayanivettom start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Padayanivettom?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kattanam, Charummood, Chunakkara, Thamarakkulam, Bharanikkavu.
